channel.title: pmset on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in pmset on IT notes

item.title: Prevent Mac to Sleep
item.description: To stop sleep entirely: sudo pmset -a disablesleep 1 To revert, allow sleep again: sudo pmset -a disablesleep 0 To display global power settings: pmset -g

item.title: womp
item.description: To enable WoL (Wake-on-LAN) on macOS: $ sudo pmset womp 1 Then check the settings: $ pmset -g System-wide power settings: Currently in use: standbydelay 10800 standby 1 womp 1 halfdim 1 hibernatefile /var/vm/sleepimage powernap 1 gpuswitch 2 networkoversleep 0 disksleep 10 sleep 1 (sleep prevented by coreaudiod, coreaudiod, iTunes) autopoweroffdelay 28800 hibernatemode 3 autopoweroff 1 ttyskeepawake 1 displaysleep 10 tcpkeepalive 1 acwake 0 lidwake 1
